title: Verilator internal fault when using `localparam` and an interface with `parameter type`.

features.name: interface with parameter type
features.description: Code should include an interface definition with a parameter type

features.name: interface instantiation with type parameter override
features.description: Code should include an interface instantiation that overrides the type parameter with a different type than the default

features.name: localparam assignment with $bits on interface signal
features.description: Code should include a localparam assignment that uses $bits() on an interface signal with overridden type parameter
